text.title: Ai Earned Value Management — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the project have stable WBS, API access to Git + tracker + budget, and ≥6-week duration?

branch.when: wbs_stable == true AND apis_accessible == true AND duration_weeks >= 6
branch.conclusion: Wire the AI EVM pipeline: weekly compute + CI publish + named PM sign-off.
Block. Establish API access first; manual EVM is not in scope of this methodology.
Skip. CI cannot be computed with so few samples.
